name: Mangosteen
summary: It should be framed conservatively because broad anti-inflammatory and disease claims outrun the evidence.
description: It should be framed conservatively because broad anti-inflammatory and disease claims outrun the evidence.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: A Canadian Consensus on Androgenetic Alopecia: Approach and Management
Discovery of Natural Products for Cancer Prevention
Mangosteen extract reduces the bacterial load of eggshell and improves egg quality

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Pericarp/rind extracts and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Pericarp/rind extracts and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
